projects.title: ProducerDash
projects.description: A live production dashboard that follows your service order, syncs with ProPresenter timers and playlists, and shares a live rundown with volunteers and camera operators on any device.

projects.title: Stage Plot
projects.description: Part of ProducerDash. A visual stage layout builder that maps who stands where, what they play, and which mic channel they use. Build the stage once, set weekly assignments as your team rotates through it, and publish a live portal musicians and crew can open on any phone.

projects.title: PrompterFlow
projects.description: A MIDI teleprompter for live production, where an operator controls the script and scroll speed while talent reads a clean full screen prompter, synced to the show.

projects.title: My Kiss Anime
projects.description: A MERN stack social media application with logins to showcase your favorite Animes

projects.title: The Pursuit of Hoppiness
projects.description: An app for discovering local breweries in your area

projects.title: Password Generator
projects.description: A simple app for generating passwords

projects.title: Note Keeper
projects.description: A JS app for creating and keeping notes

projects.title: Budget Tracker
projects.description: A basic PWA for tracking a budget

projects.title: Weather App
projects.description: A frontend vanilla JS app for checking the weather
